text: After the build fails, just kill the process and restart from scratch in the terminal.
I need to shoot the photo at golden hour for the lighting to be perfect.
To get the eggs fluffy, gently crack the egg on the side of the bowl.
We need to slash the budget by 15% to stay on track for Q4 projections.
Before deploying, nuke the cache so the CDN serves the latest assets.
My coach told me to bomb the interview if I want to make the starting lineup.
After the test run, axe the feature if the conversion rate drops below 2%.
Once the script is ready, execute the script to automate the data migration.
I'll burn the ISO to a USB drive using Rufus for the clean install.
The manager decided to destroy the old build and start over with a fresh approach.
First, crack the egg into a bowl and whisk it until frothy. Then, once the pan is hot, you can kill the heat before adding the cheese to prevent scrambling.

The CFO wants to slash the budget for Q3, so we'll have to axe the feature that's still in development.
For the portrait, make sure to shoot the photo in natural light and then use a soft brush to burn the ISO noise in post-processing.
In the final boss fight, execute the script to trigger the cutscene and annihilate the wave of minions before the timer runs out.
After the build failed, I had to destroy the old build artifacts and start fresh from the main branch.
The coach told us to bomb the interview with energy and confidence, then execute the game plan perfectly.
To make the perfect omelet, you need to crack the egg cleanly and then kill the flame just before folding it.

During the sprint review, the product owner decided to axe the feature for the next release.
